name: Lumpia Ideas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Any sort of meat you wish.
any sort of fish will do (tuna worked beautifully)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare at least 2-3 different types of vegetables for the lumpia.
2. Use Lumpia wrappers, which can be found in most Asian food markets or as Egg roll/spring roll wrappers.
3. In a deep pan or wok, fry the meat until fully cooked.
4. Add the prepared vegetables, salt, pepper, and soy sauce to the pan. Stir-fry until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Drain the mixture using a colander and set aside.
6. Place the meat mixture onto a Lumpia wrapper. Spread a thin layer of the drippings over the filling.
7. Seal the lumpia by rolling it up tightly, like wrapping a burrito. If needed, seal with an egg mixed with water and a little flour for smaller portions.
8. Deep fry the lumpia in oil at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown.
9. Serve with either sweet and sour sauce or a mixture of soy sauce and vinegar (equal parts) drizzled with one or two cloves of smashed garlic.
